'''Sand sloths''' were large, fur-covered animals native to [[Annoo (Gelefil)|Annoo]]. [[Demma Moll]] used them as beasts of burden on her farm complex.

When [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] tried to help with chores, a sand sloth hit Threepio with its tail.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]] {{Mo}}
